title: Extended Materials for the study protocol 'Policy experiment aversion: Protocol and analysis plan for a survey and embedded trial conducted during a national debate about a real-life policy experiment on the effectiveness of an in-work tax credit'
author: Elgersma, Ingeborg Hess
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Extended materials for the study protocol 'Policy experiment aversion: Protocol and analysis plan for a survey and embedded trial conducted during a national debate about a reallife policy experiment on the effectiveness of an in-work tax credit' 
 Contains: 
 
 Survey questionnaire - Norwegian and English 
 SPIRIT checklist 
 Risk of Bias 2 assessment
steps_raw:
Extended materials for the study protocol 'Policy experiment aversion: Protocol and analysis plan for a survey and embedded trial conducted during a national debate about a reallife policy experiment on the effectiveness of an in-work tax credit'
